mission.title: kuadrant: Add observability feature flag to Kuadrant CRD
mission.description:
Closes #1167
Supercedes #1143 (not using a fork to allow all tests to have access to secrets)
Also adds a new user guide as part of #1158 (separate PR to add it to docs site will follow)

A new field is introduced to the Kuadrant CRD `spec.observability.enable`.
If `true`, various ServiceMonitors and PodMonitors will be created:

- Kuadrant operator servicemonitor
- Authorino operator servicemonitor
- Limitador operator servicemonitor
- DNS operator servicemonitor

Also, for each Gateway in the toplogy, the following monitors are created (depending on the Gateway provider):

- Istio Gateways
    - Istiod ServiceMonitor
    - Istio gw pod (envoy) stats PodMonitor
- Envoy Gateway Gateways
    - Envoy Gateway ServiceMonitor
    - Envoy Proxy Stats PodMonitor 

To accomplish this, a new reconciler is added `observability_reconciler.go`
All monitors are added to the topology.
The 4 core component monitors are linked to the root Kuarant CR in the topology.
The other monitors are not linked,

resolution.summary:
Closes #1065
